text: Zarbadar Gloonch was a Drumbloxian that appeared in Big Trouble In Little Sanchez. She and her husband, Gar were having marital issues and went to Nuptia 4 for counseling. Unfortunately for them, their attempt to repair their marriage ended in disaster when Beth and Jerry Smith's mythologs broke out of their cells and went on a murderous rampage, killing Zarbadar and her husband in the process.
